speaker: Baten
text: Ya sure do love talkin' to me, don’tcha? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Because I’ll only ever get to talk to you here on this ship. *paw prints*

speaker: Baten
text: That ain’t true. After this exam, I was gonna stay at the Knights College for a while. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: There's somethin’ I wanna talk to Lord Schithead about! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What do you usually talk about with him? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: I try to get 'em to go out to sea with me! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Oh... I can only imagine what that’d be like. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: He doesn’t like riding boats even though he flies over the ocean? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: He’s always been like that. He shuts himself in with all those rules he makes for himself.

speaker: Argo
text: He’s not like you at all.

speaker: Baten
text: I know, right? Me and him just don’t mesh. *
